scripts.docker:migrate: for f in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U sift -d sift -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < "$f"; done
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.db:migrate: for f in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T postgres psql -U sift -d sift -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < "$f"; done
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
